title: Myer Creek
summary:
Myer Creek may refer to:

Myer Creek (Coyote Wash), in Imperial County, California
Myer Creek (Bear Creek tributary), in Jackson County, Oregon
Myers Creek (Banister River tributary), in Halifax County, Virginia
